since_last: 68% of 101 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +2.83%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 68% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC +0.20% · Gold +0.66% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 68% of 101 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +2.83%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +2.83%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.42%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: PUBM is the standout at +8.05%
cards.body: Leaders: PUBM +8.05%, SKHY +6.08%, MU +5.12%, AMD +3.98%, TER +3.98%. Laggards: SAP -1.74%, WDAY -1.57%, NOW -1.29%, INTU -1.14%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.77% at $126.18
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.77% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
